description: Lightweight, performance-focused functional programming library for .NET: Result<T>, Maybe<T>, and railway-oriented error handling with zero-allocation, Native-AOT-ready primitives.
rules: Functional targets .NET with zero-allocation and Native AOT in mind; core types are readonly structs and prefer ValueTask over Task on likely-synchronous paths.
Model expected failures with Result/Result<T> and absence with Maybe<T> instead of throwing exceptions or returning null.
Compose with railway-oriented operators (Bind/Map/Tap) rather than imperative control flow.
Use Functional.xunit fluent assertions (ShouldBe().Success()/.Failure(), .Some()/.None()) when testing Result/Maybe/OneOf.
OneOf is the external NuGet package (v3.0.271), not a library-owned type.
